title: Fayose At 65: An Iconic Brand For Forthrightness And Grassroots Connection, - FinancialEDGE
description: By Emmanuel Ajibulu Your Excellency, I sincerely celebrate you as you commemorate the 65th anniversary of your birth for a life that has been well lived, especially in the service of God and humanity. I celebrate a man of vision, a man of purpose and achievement. I celebrate a leader and mentor of men, Dr
html: By Emmanuel Ajibulu
